name: Columbia Sander Head
description: The Columbia Sander Head incorporates all of the industry’s preferred functionalities in the first fully machined billet aluminum body. Utilizing our No Flip technology, our Sander Head flows smoothly on the wall.

name: Columbia 4' Extendable One Handle
description: The Columbia One Handle is designed to work with your Columbia products universally. From the Nail Spotters and Angleheads, to the Rollers and the Corner Boxes, the One system allows you to lighten your load and still utilize all the finishing tools you love. Add a Tomalock adaptor and you can even use this handle with Flat Boxes if necessary.  This One handle is all you’ll need.

name: Columbia 3'-5' Extendable One Handle
description: The Columbia One Handle is designed to work with your Columbia products universally. From the Nail Spotters and Angleheads, to the Rollers and the Corner Boxes, the One system allows you to lighten your load and still utilize all the finishing tools you love. Add a Tomalock adaptor and you can even use this handle with Flat Boxes if necessary.  This One handle is all you’ll need.

name: Columbia Inside Corner Roller
description: Our Inside Corner Roller offers the easiest roll in the industry. With our split wheel design tapes do not drag upon initial contact. The tape immediately imbeds in the corner with all unneeded compound being pushed out from behind.

name: Columbia Outside Corner Roller
description: Offering four different profiles, Columbia Outside Corner Rollers will be sure to make your tape on bead setting job faster.

name: Columbia Mud Pump (Top Disconnect)
description: What a workhorse this tool is. Built to perform in the toughest environment, our pump smoothly and quickly fills your tools. With a 20 degree angle, the handle acts as a lever and keeps the operator from having to reach as far as other models on the market.

name: Columbia Box Filler
description: Available for both our regular and Tallboy pumps, these aluminum and stainless steel attachments are tough and effective. The Box Filler makes filling your Flat Boxes, Nail Spotters and Corner Boxes a dream.

name: Columbia Matrix Extendable Flat Box Handle
description: The Columbia Matrix Flat Box Handle is lightweight and all mechanical. With a 90 degree grip, the Matrix gives you increased control over your box. These handles are durable and extremely long lasting, all while maintaining the comfort and ease of use that you’re used to with the Columbia brand of tools. The Columbia Matrix mechanical flat box handle is made of all billet aluminum, ensuring a long life.

name: Columbia 10" Flat Finishing Box
description: Columbia Taping Tools 10" Hinged Drywall Flat Finisher Box features precision joint compound metering adjustment for top quality finish surfaces on drywall butt joints and flat seams. Integrated door axle and pressure plate system allows smooth, easy operation and quick access for easy cleanup! New, ultra-reliable door plate wiper resists expansion or deterioration, for long-term ease of operation and greater reliability.

name: Columbia 12" Flat Finishing Box
description: Columbia Taping Tools 12" Hinged Drywall Flat Finisher Box features precision joint compound metering adjustment for top quality finish surfaces on drywall butt joints and flat seams. Integrated door axle and pressure plate system allows smooth, easy operation and quick access for easy cleanup! New, ultra-reliable door plate wiper resists expansion or deterioration, for long-term ease of operation and greater reliability.

name: Columbia 2″ Nailspotter
description: The Columbia 2″ Nailspotter is a big improvement in screw finishing. It has the option of having wheels or the traditional skid plate. It is light weight and has an easy to adjust thumb screw for swivel tension. By far the best Nailspotter on the market.

name: Columbia Gooseneck
description: Available in our regular and Tallboy, these stainless steel attachments are tough and effective. Rubber covers on the horseshoe protect your taper while being filled.

name: Columbia 3″ Anglehead
description: The Columbia 3″ Angleheads are a tool we are especially proud of. They stand atop our overbuilt lineup of products with their beautiful looks and construction. But above all their beauty, in the corner is all that matters, and they do not disappoint. Whether you are running behind the Corner Roller or skimming on a Corner Box these tools deliver great corner. They run like they are on ice and leave a finish that is ready to paint.

name: Columbia 3″ Nailspotter
description: The Columbia 3″ Nailspotter is a big improvement in screw finishing. It has the option of having wheels or the traditional skid plate. It is light weight and has an easy to adjust thumb screw for swivel tension. By far the best Nailspotter on the market.

name: Columbia 2.5" Standard Corner Flusher
description: Columbia Standard Corner Flushers have redefined angle finishing. They are built from the best materials, but above all, they are each hand ground and checked on a granite plate for perfection. Each one comes with wheels and an allen key for those who prefer not to use them.

name: Columbia 3" Standard Corner Flusher
description: Columbia Standard Corner Flushers have redefined angle finishing. They are built from the best materials, but above all, they are each hand ground and checked on a granite plate for perfection. Each one comes with wheels and an allen key for those who prefer not to use them.

name: Columbia 36" 180-Grip Flat Box Handle
description: The New 36" Feather Weight 180º handle allows for a full braking capability over the entire 180º angle span. Grips the axle with a tremendous amount of pressure to eliminate the possibility of slippage when dealing with difficult angle situations. As a result, this produces cleaner, quicker and more efficient application of joint compound. A very versatile design that provides the best possible braking at any angle. Extra strong billet aluminum design for years of rugged usage. Less moving parts mean less breakdowns.

name: Columbia 8″ Throttle Box
description: The 8″ Throttle Box is another great product of ours that offers years of great performance. All billet construction with a threaded stainless steel ball, this Corner Box looks and operates seamlessly. All our Corner Boxes now come standard with automatic capabilities, making pushing the box at least 50% easier than standard boxes. The new springs have adjustable tensions and greatly reduce the occurence of air pockets while running. The Throttle Box allows the corners to be quickly coated with your choice of angle head or applicator head. *Patent Pending

name: Columbia 3.5″ Anglehead
description: The Columbia 3.5″ Angleheads are a tool we are especially proud of. They stand atop our overbuilt lineup of products with their beautiful looks and construction. But above all their beauty, in the corner is all that matters, and they do not disappoint. Whether you are running behind the Corner Roller or skimming on a Corner Box these tools deliver great corner. They run like they are on ice and leave a finish that is ready to paint.

name: Columbia 10" Fat Boy Flat Box
description: Columbia offers the widest range of high quality, high capacity finishing boxes in the world. From our 5.5″ Fat Boy to our 12″, they are all star performers. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joints for years. We have been told for years that our boxes are the smoothest finishing and easiest to push, and now they’re also the highest capacity on the market. We are very proud to get this feedback and will make sure that every Fat Boy box we make exceeds your expectations.

name: Columbia 2.5″ Anglehead
description: The Columbia 2.5″ Angleheads are a tool we are especially proud of. They stand atop our overbuilt lineup of products with their beautiful looks and construction. But above all their beauty, in the corner is all that matters, and they do not disappoint. Whether you are running behind the Corner Roller or skimming on a Corner Box these tools deliver great corner. They run like they are on ice and leave a finish that is ready to paint.

name: Columbia 42" Compound Mud Tube
description: Columbia Compound Tubes have taken the market place by storm. Finally a high quality long lasting tube that is easy to push. We have had many customers, after trying this tube, report back that they changed over their entire fleet.

name: Columbia Flat Applicator
description: These tools glide along the wall leaving the perfect amount of compound on flat surfaces. Machined from a solid piece of billet and then mounted with stainless runners, this tool is built to work.

name: Columbia Twist Lock Extendable Handle 3' - 8'
description: Our popular Twist Lock Handle is a three stage pole with a brass thread that allows users to easily adjust where the seam falls, creating a more comfortable grip. This handle extends from 3′ to 8′ and is used with the Nail Spotters, all Rollers and the Angle Head Adaptor.

name: Columbia Two Way Internal Corner Applicator
description: Columbia Two Way Internal Corner Applicators are all machined from solid aluminum billet. They are very accurate and their Delrin wheels glide along the wall.

name: Columbia 2.5" Combo Flusher
description: Columbia Combo Flushers have redefined angle finishing. They are built from the best materials, but above all, they are each hand ground and checked on a granite plate for perfection. Each one comes with wheels and an allen key for those who prefer not to use them.

name: Columbia 3" Direct Corner Flusher
description: Columbia Direct Corner Flushers have redefined angle finishing. They are built from the best materials, but above all, they are each hand ground and checked on a granite plate for perfection. Each one comes with wheels and an allen key for those who prefer not to use them.

name: Columbia 4-8' Long Extendible Handle
description: The Columbia Long Extendible Handle is a 1 and 1/4″ thick design pipe. These handles are durable and extremely long lasting, all while maintaining the comfort and ease of use that you’re used to with the Columbia brand of tools. The Columbia Long Extendible Handle is not only the lightest on the market, but also the strongest, ensuring a long life.

name: Columbia 5.5" Flat Finishing Box
description: Columbia offers the widest range of high quality Flat Boxes in the world. From our 5.5” specialty box to our 14” they are all star performers. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joints for years. We have been being told for years that our boxes are the smoothest finishing and easiest to push. We are very proud to get this feedback and will make sure that every Flat Box we make exceeds your expectations.

name: Columbia Anglehead Adaptor
description: The Anglehead Adaptor is used on the Columbia One Handle System to seamlessly adjust from Corner Roller and Nailspotter to Anglehead! The AHA is purchased separately.

name: Columbia Automatic Taper
description: The Columbia Automatic Taper is a precision built tool that has been perfected over 40 years. This tool will tape flats and angles effortlessly year after year. From less drag in the corners to any easy to remove cap for cleaning, this tool will not let you down. A hard anodized tube eliminates the track lines that occur on so many other tools. Stainless steel side plates and cable drum and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. The NEW Patent Pending Pump Action Sleeve gives the operator the smoothest cut on the market and the pull ring is great for higher ceilings. Every taper comes standard with an adjustable brake and quick release for tape changing. If you are serious about taping and care how a taper feels and performs this is the one for you.

name: Columbia Corner Cobra Adjustable Roller
description: The Corner Cobra is an amazing time saving tool. It allows the user to roll out No-Coat and other structural corner beads at almost all inside and outside angles. We have heard back from users that it does it quicker and better, which is to us a home run. Another one of our patented products that is changing the time it takes to finish a job.

name: Columbia 42" 180-Grip Flat Box Handle
description: The New 42" Feather Weight 180º handle allows for a full braking capability over the entire 180º angle span. Grips the axle with a tremendous amount of pressure to eliminate the possibility of slippage when dealing with difficult angle situations. As a result, this produces cleaner, quicker and more efficient application of joint compound. A very versatile design that provides the best possible braking at any angle. Extra strong billet aluminum design for years of rugged usage. Less moving parts mean less breakdowns.

name: Columbia 8" Door Gasket for Angle Box
description: Columbia 8" Door Gasket for Angle Box

name: Columbia 8" Fat Boy Flat Box
description: Columbia offers the widest range of high quality, high capacity finishing boxes in the world. From our 5.5″ Fat Boy to our 12″, they are all star performers. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joints for years. We have been told for years that our boxes are the smoothest finishing and easiest to push, and now they’re also the highest capacity on the market. We are very proud to get this feedback and will make sure that every Fat Boy box we make exceeds your expectations.

name: Columbia Matrix XL Extendable Flat Box Handle
description: The Columbia Matrix Flat Box Handle is lightweight and all mechanical. With a 90 degree grip, the Matrix gives you increased control over your box. These handles are durable and extremely long lasting, all while maintaining the comfort and ease of use that you’re used to with the Columbia brand of tools. The Columbia Matrix mechanical flat box handle is made of all billet aluminum, ensuring a long life.

name: Columbia Road Case
description: The highly requested Columbia Road Case has an extremely durable design to protect your tools on the job. Built to take the abuses of travel, and wear and tear from job sites, the Road Case comes equipped with rubber feet, rolling wheels and ergonomic handles. This case will hold a full set of Columbia tools, including a pump!

name: Columbia Semi Automatic Tool Case
description: Lightweight, but extremely durable, Columbia’s Semi-Automatic case can accommodate a complete semi-automatic set of tools. With the egg-shell foam inside, the case secures the tools in place when it is latched closed. The Semi-Automatic case is also useful for storage of the Columbia Tomahawk Smoothing Blades (up to 40″). Not intended for automatic tools.

name: Columbia Tactical Set
description: The NEW Tactical Set makes moving to Automatic Taping Tools easy! Every taping tool you will need to completely finish a house comes packaged inside our durable, rugged Road Case. This set takes the guess work out of choosing the perfect drywall taping tools kit.

name: Columbia Wide Outside Corner Roller
description: Offering four different profiles, Columbia Outside Corner Rollers will be sure to make your tape on bead setting job faster.

name: Columbia 18" Closet Monster Flat Box Handle
description: The Columbia Closet Monster Flat Box Handle is a 1 and 1/4″ thick design pipe. These handles are durable and extremely long lasting, all while maintaining the comfort and ease of use that you’re used to with the Columbia brand of tools. The Columbia Closet Monster is not only the lightest on the market, but also the strongest, ensuring a long life.

name: Columbia 2.5" Anglehead Blade Maintenance Kit
description: There are currently no resources for this product.

name: Columbia 2″ Anglehead
description: The Columbia 2″ Angleheads are a tool we are especially proud of. They stand atop our overbuilt lineup of products with their beautiful looks and construction. But above all their beauty, in the corner is all that matters, and they do not disappoint. Whether you are running behind the Corner Roller or skimming on a Corner Box these tools deliver great corner. They run like they are on ice and leave a finish that is ready to paint.

name: Columbia 7″ Throttle Box
description: The 7″ Throttle Box is another great product of ours that offers years of great performance. All billet construction with a threaded stainless steel ball, this Corner Box looks and operates seamlessly. All our Corner Boxes now come standard with automatic capabilities, making pushing the box at least 50% easier than standard boxes. The Throttle Box allows the corners to be quickly coated with your choice of angle head or applicator head. *Patent Pending

name: Columbia 8" Flat Finishing Box
description: Columbia Taping Tools 8" Hinged Drywall Flat Finisher Box features precision joint compound metering adjustment for top quality finish surfaces on drywall butt joints and flat seams. Integrated door axle and pressure plate system allows smooth, easy operation and quick access for easy cleanup! New, ultra-reliable door plate wiper resists expansion or deterioration, for long-term ease of operation and greater reliability.

name: Columbia External 90 Mud Applicator
description: The Columbia External 90 ° Mud Applicator works for all sizes of outside bead as it puts out 3 layers of mud, one in the middle, and one on each side. The amount of pressure applied to the tube will dictate how much mud you need for larger or smaller bead. These applicators are machined from solid billet aluminum and are very accurate as their Delrin wheels glide along the wall.

name: Columbia Predator Carbon Fiber Automatic Taper
description: The Predator is the world’s first Carbon Fiber Taper and the benefits that come with this are endless. The Columbia Taper is a precision built tool that has been perfected over 38 years, but now it is also significantly lighter than all other tapers on the market and dent proof. This tool will tape flats and angles effortlessly year after year. From less drag in the corners to our easy to remove cap for cleaning, this tool will not let you down. Stainless steel side plates and cable drum and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. The Patent Pending Pump Action cutting sleeve gives the operator a smoother glide over teflon bearings, superb grip and the pull ring is great for higher ceilings. The Predator maintains it’s stable temperature and remains warm to the touch. Every taper comes standard with an adjustable brake and quick release for tape changing. The Titanium pull rod is just another detail that adds style and edge to this innovative, unique taper. If you are serious about taping and care how a taper feels and performs this is the one for you.

name: Columbia Removable Cover Plate Attachment Block
description: Columbia Removable Cover Plate Attachment Block

name: Columbia 12" Fat Boy Automatic Assist Drywall Flat Box
description: Columbia offers the widest range of high quality Finishing Boxes in the world. The Automatic Flat Boxes reduce the need to push the compound on to the wall. By engaging, the box springs put pressure on the compound chamber requiring only a light push to operate the box. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joints for years. We have been told for years that our boxes are the smoothest finishing and easiest to push. We are very proud to get this feedback and will make sure that every Finishing Box we make exceeds your expectations.

name: Columbia 2 Wheel Inside Corner Applicator
description: Columbia Inside Corner Applicators are all machined from solid aluminum billet. They are very accurate and their Delrin wheels glide along the wall. Offered in two and four wheel designs.

name: Columbia 3" Combo Flusher
description: Columbia Combo Flushers have redefined angle finishing. They are built from the best materials, but above all, they are each hand ground and checked on a granite plate for perfection. Each one comes with wheels and an allen key for those who prefer not to use them.

name: Columbia 3.5" Standard Corner Flusher
description: Columbia Standard Corner Flushers have redefined angle finishing. They are built from the best materials, but above all, they are each hand ground and checked on a granite plate for perfection. Each one comes with wheels and an allen key for those who prefer not to use them.

name: Columbia 32" Cam Lock Tube
description: Our Cam Lock Tube is so simple and so positive we would not recommend using any other tube when it comes to fast set compounds. The brass cams easily find and lock to the stainless ring using the same technology as a firehose.

name: Columbia 4 Wheel Inside Corner Applicator
description: Columbia Inside Corner Applicators are all machined from solid aluminum billet. They are very accurate and their Delrin wheels glide along the wall. Offered in two and four wheel designs.

name: Columbia Matrix 29-39" Extendable Flat Box Handle
description: The Columbia Matrix Flat Box Handle is lightweight and all mechanical. With a 90 degree grip, the Matrix gives you increased control over your box. These handles are durable and extremely long lasting, all while maintaining the comfort and ease of use that you’re used to with the Columbia brand of tools. The Columbia Matrix mechanical flat box handle is made of all billet aluminum, ensuring a long life.

name: Columbia Outside 90 Mud Head
description: Proportionate grooves give you a consistent mud distribution on the 90 degree outside angles and speeds up the pre-filling process. Made out of UHMW, the strong durable design makes these Mud Heads the best on the market.

name: Columbia Tall Boy Box Filler
description: Available for both our regular and Tallboy pumps, these aluminum and stainless steel attachments are tough and effective. The Box Filler makes filling your Flat Boxes, Nail Spotters and Corner Boxes a dream.

name: Columbia Tall Boy Mud Pump
description: We are very proud to offer this tool. After using it, people agree they would never go back to the standard pump again. The Tallboy is a mud pump that will allow you to stand upright while filling your tools. The extra height also allows for use in a 30 gallon pale for those who want to cut down on mixing time.

name: Columbia Angle Head Ball Holder Release Clip
description: Columbia Angle Head Ball Holder Release Clip

name: Columbia Outside Bullnose Corner Roller
description: Offering four different profiles, Columbia Outside Corner Rollers will be sure to make your tape on bead setting job faster.

name: Columbia Phantom Dustless Drywall Sander
description: The Columbia Phantom DDM Sander incorporates all of the industries preferred functionality in a beautifully machine billet body. This commercial grade dustless sander works with any vacuum with a 1.5″ inlet and collects 99% of dust! The Phantom comes with the all billet aluminum sanding head, the 30 ft hose, and the extendible (26″ to 46″) pole.

name: Columbia Semi Automatic Taper
description: The Semi-Automatic Taper or “Bucket Taper” allows users to apply a specific amount of compound to a large volume of tape. It has a tape spool with brake to cut down on operator fatigue. Columbia’s semi automatic taper is easy to use, durable and has laser engraved instruction on the door.

name: Columbia Tall Boy Gooseneck
description: Available in our regular and Tallboy, these stainless steel attachments are tough and effective. Rubber covers on the horseshoe protect your taper while being filled.

name: Columbia Taper Chain Tension & Guide Bracket
description: Columbia Taper Chain Tension & Guide Bracket

name: Columbia Taper Mud Shut Off Gasket
description: Columbia Taper Mud Shut Off Gasket

name: Columbia Tomalock
description: The Columbia Tomalock is a handle adapter used with the Tomahawk set of Smoothing Blades. With no plastic pieces, the Tomalock doesn’t snap under pressure or the weight of the larger blades. This also increases the stability. The quick release allows you to easily and steadily adjust the angle of attack. The Columbia Tomahawk, combined the Tomalock and the Columbia One Handle, will change what the industry expects from a professional grade Smoothing Blade.

name: Columbia Tall Boy Predator Automatic Taper
description: Our Carbon Fiber Predator Automatic Taper is one of the latest innovations out of the Columbia workshop. The first carbon fiber taper on the market, the Predator is also the lightest and most durable. We are proud to offer our customers the next generation in top notch drywall taping tools.

name: Columbia 10" Automatic Flat Box
description: Columbia offers the widest range of high quality Finishing Boxes in the world. The Automatic Flat Boxes reduce the need to push the compound on to the wall. name: Columbia 10" Fat Boy Automatic Assist Drywall Flat Box
description: Columbia offers the widest range of high quality Finishing Boxes in the world. The Automatic Flat Boxes reduce the need to push the compound on to the wall. By engaging, the box springs put pressure on the compound chamber requiring only a light push to operate the box. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joints for years. We have been told for years that our boxes are the smoothest finishing and easiest to push. We are very proud to get this feedback and will make sure that every Finishing Box we make exceeds your expectations.

name: Columbia 10" Inside Track Fat Boy Flat Box
description: High capacity Inside Track FatBoy box holds 30% more mud compound than standard flat box, for less trips back to the loading pump. Compatible with all leading brands of drywall flat box finisher brake handles, and quick clean feature allows convenient access to clean without removing pressure plate. 10" box is excellent for applying the base coat of mud to drywall flat seams and is super effective when finishing butt joints.

name: Columbia 10" Sabre Smoothing Blade
description: Columbia has answered the call from our customers looking for a lighter/more affordable version of the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades. The Sabre Smoothing Blades still offer a precise finish but by no means does this product replace the Tomahawk’s being our premium option. It is our solution to Columbia Customers looking for a lighter/more affordable option. The body profile remains the same as the Tomahawk’s but is made from high quality plastic rather than billet aluminum.

name: Columbia 10" Stainless Steel Comfort Grip Taping Knife
description: Competitively priced, these stainless steel knives offer unbeatable value—comparable to the cost of carbon steel.

name: Columbia 10-32 X Nyloc Jam Nut-2 per pack
description: Columbia 10-32 X Nyloc Jam Nut-2 per pack

name: Columbia 12" Inside Track Fat Boy Flat Box
description: Premier/Blue flat box users have long known the advantage of inside wheels for quickly finishing butt joints. The inside wheels allow for quick multi-coating of butts because the wheels do not track into the split finish. The Inside Track boxes are ideal for any contractor looking for an advantage on butt joints, or anyone converting from Premier/Blue style tools.

name: Columbia 12" Sabre Smoothing Blade
description: Columbia has answered the call from our customers looking for a lighter/more affordable version of the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades. The Sabre Smoothing Blades still offer a precise finish but by no means does this product replace the Tomahawk’s being our premium option. It is our solution to Columbia Customers looking for a lighter/more affordable option. The body profile remains the same as the Tomahawk’s but is made from high quality plastic rather than billet aluminum.

name: Columbia 12" Stainless Steel Comfort Grip Taping Knife
description: Competitively priced, these stainless steel knives offer unbeatable value—comparable to the cost of carbon steel.

name: Columbia 12" Stainless Steel Mud Pan
description: Introducing the Columbia Mud Pan—the first in our new line of premium hand tools, designed for professionals who demand durability, comfort, and performance. Crafted from heavy-gauge stainless steel, this mud pan is built to withstand the toughest tasks, while its watertight, laser-welded seams ensure long-lasting reliability. With tapered ends and sides for a secure grip, this tool is ready to handle any job with ease. Plus, every Columbia Mud Pan comes with a free soft, non-slip rubber grip for enhanced comfort and ease of use.

name: Columbia 14" Automatic Flat Box
description: Columbia offers the widest range of high quality Finishing Boxes in the world. The Automatic Flat Boxes reduce the need to push the compound on to the wall. By engaging, the box springs put pressure on the compound chamber requiring only a light push to operate the box. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joints for years. We have been told for years that our boxes are the smoothest finishing and easiest to push. We are very proud to get this feedback and will make sure that every Finishing Box we make exceeds your expectations.

name: Columbia 14" Sabre Smoothing Blade
description: Columbia has answered the call from our customers looking for a lighter/more affordable version of the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades. The Sabre Smoothing Blades still offer a precise finish but by no means does this product replace the Tomahawk’s being our premium option. It is our solution to Columbia Customers looking for a lighter/more affordable option. The body profile remains the same as the Tomahawk’s but is made from high quality plastic rather than billet aluminum.

name: Columbia 14" Stainless Steel Comfort Grip Taping Knife
description: Competitively priced, these stainless steel knives offer unbeatable value—comparable to the cost of carbon steel.

name: Columbia 14" Stainless Steel Mud Pan
description: Introducing the Columbia Mud Pan—the first in our new line of premium hand tools, designed for professionals who demand durability, comfort, and performance. Crafted from heavy-gauge stainless steel, this mud pan is built to withstand the toughest tasks, while its watertight, laser-welded seams ensure long-lasting reliability. With tapered ends and sides for a secure grip, this tool is ready to handle any job with ease. Plus, every Columbia Mud Pan comes with a free soft, non-slip rubber grip for enhanced comfort and ease of use.

name: Columbia 36" 180-Grip Bent Flat Box Handle
description: Columbia 36" 180-Grip Bent Box Handle allows for a full braking capability over the entire 180º angle span. Grips the axle with a tremendous amount of pressure to eliminates the possibility of slippage when dealing with difficult angle situations. As a result, this produces cleaner, quicker and more efficient application of joint compound. A very versatile design that provides the best possible braking at any angle. The bent handle design adds necessary leverage in all situations, and truly excels on butt-joints and headers.

name: Columbia 55" Cam Lock Tube
description: Our Cam Lock Tube is so simple and so positive we would not recommend using any other tube when it comes to fast set compounds. The brass cams easily find and lock to the stainless ring using the same technology as a firehose.

name: Columbia 60" 180-Grip Bent Flat Box Handle
description: Columbia 60" 180-Grip Bent Box Handle allows for a full braking capability over the entire 180º angle span. Grips the axle with a tremendous amount of pressure to eliminates the possibility of slippage when dealing with difficult angle situations. As a result, this produces cleaner, quicker and more efficient application of joint compound. A very versatile design that provides the best possible braking at any angle. The bent handle design adds necessary leverage in all situations, and truly excels on butt-joints and headers.

name: Columbia 7" Flat Finishing Box
description: Columbia Taping Tools 7" Hinged Drywall Flat Finisher Box features precision joint compound metering adjustment for top quality finish surfaces on drywall butt joints and flat seams. Integrated door axle and pressure plate system allows smooth, easy operation and quick access for easy cleanup! New, ultra-reliable door plate wiper resists expansion or deterioration, for long-term ease of operation and greater reliability.

description: Columbia has answered the call from our customers looking for a lighter/more affordable version of the Tomahawk Smoothing Blades. name: Columbia 8" Inside Track Fat Boy Flat Box
description: High capacity Inside Track FatBoy box holds 30% more mud compound than standard flat box, for less trips back to the loading pump. Compatible with all leading brands of drywall flat box finisher brake handles, and quick clean feature allows convenient access to clean without removing pressure plate. 8" box is excellent for applying the base coat of mud to drywall flat seams and is super effective when finishing butt joints.

name: Columbia Compound Tube Box Filler
description: Our Cam Lock Tube Box Filler is a simple attachment to the Cam Lock Compound Tube, that allows you to easily fill your Flat Finishing Boxes without the use of a Hot Mud Pump. This is a great addition to any finisher’s tool collection.

name: Columbia L-Trim Mud Applicator Head
description: Proportionate grooves give you a consistent mud distribution on the wall and speeds up the pre-filling process. Made out of UHMW, the strong durable design makes these Mud Heads the best on the market.

name: Columbia ONE Angle Box Door Adaptor
description: Columbia ONE Angle Box Door Adaptor

name: Columbia Predator Tactical Set
description: The NEW Predator Tactical Set makes moving to Automatic Taping Tools easy and includes the upgrade of the Columbia Predator Carbon Fibre Automatic Taper! Every taping tool you will need to completely finish a house comes packaged inside our durable, rugged Road Case. This set takes the guess work out of choosing the perfect drywall taping tools kit.

name: Columbia Retaining Quick Release Spring Clip
description: Columbia Retaining Quick Release Spring Clip

name: Columbia Retaining Quick Release Spring Shaft
description: Columbia Retaining Quick Release Spring Shaft

name: Columbia Sabre Set
description: The New Columbia Sabre set takes the guess work out of starting off with Smoothing Blades. Just like the Tomahawk Warrior set, this set contains a variety of sizes that will help you complete most every smoothing blade job. From wiping down tapes, to fully coating walls and ceilings, and everything in between, this kit will have you covered.

name: Columbia Sabre Smoothing Blade Claw Adapter
description: Columbia Sabre Smoothing Blade Claw Adapter

name: Columbia Sawed Off Mini Automatic Taper
description: The Columbia Automatic Taper is a precision built tool that is back by popular demand. This tool will tape flats and angles effortlessly year after year. From less drag in the corners to any easy to remove cap for cleaning, this tool will not let you down. A hard anodized tube eliminates the track lines that occur on so many other tools. Stainless steel side plates and cable drum and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. Every taper comes standard with an adjustable brake and quick release for tape changing. At 39″, this taper is perfect for tight spaces such as stairwells, closets, scaffold and low ceilings. If you are serious about taping and care how a taper feels and performs this is the one for you.

name: Columbia Sawed Off Mini PREDATOR Automatic Taper
description: Columbia Taping Tools introduces the world's first Mini Carbon Fiber Taper, The Predator "Sawed Off" Mini. Unlike other taper bodies made mostly from aluminum, the Predator's Carbon Fiber construction, makes this precision-engineered tool 20% lighter and more durable then any standard mini taper on the market. Another unique benefit of this Dent Proof construction, is that Carbon Fiber maintains temperature stability, meaning this taper will remain warm to the touch. The 6 wheel cutting sleeve has been updated in favor of teflon sliders which gives the operator a smoother glide and better grip. Now, changing the sliders out is simple field maintenance and can be installed with a standard screwdriver in minutes as opposed to half an hour or more. The pull ring is ideal for higher ceilings. The Predator will tape flats and angles effortlessly with less drag in the corners. The quick release cap makes cleaning a breeze and the stainless steel side plates, cable drum, and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. With style, functionality, and durability the Predator from Columbia takes the -Evolution of Taping- to a whole new level. Predator "Sawed Off" Mini is perfect for taping drywall in small rooms and closets when a full size taper is too cumbersome.

name: Columbia Semi Automatic Commando Set
description: The NEW Commando Set from Columbia Tools takes the guess work out of moving over to Semi-Automatic Drywall Tools. This set is a great introduction to Semi-Auto tools for the part-time finisher, or someone who is looking to make the leap to Automatic tools but doesn’t want to jump right in yet. This set will save you time and give you a great finish. The Commando set comes with all the essentials in the Semi-Auto line, as well as a convenient case to store, and keep safe, your new Columbia Tools.
